_comment: Pricing-table feature data. status='live' shows normally; status='soon' adds a 'Soon!' pill; status='far' is hidden entirely (don't ship these rows). Comparison cell values: 'yes' | 'no' | string for free text, or an object { trial: '≤30 min video', after: '€0.50/min' } for try-once-then-priced features.

plans.name: Launch
plans.description: Package your expertise into professional video — without the editing headache.

highlights.label: 120 editing minutes / month
highlights.tip: Plenty for a weekly course video or coaching recap. Minutes refill every month.

highlights.label: Videos up to 1 hour each
highlights.tip: Long enough for a deep-dive masterclass or full coaching session — no need to chop your recording before uploading.

highlights.label: Instant AI editing + agentic content generation
highlights.tip: Drops in your B-roll, cuts ums and silences, adds captions and a music track, and can also write scripts, summaries, quizzes and lesson outlines from your recording.

highlights.label: Hosted video pages + embeddable player
highlights.tip: Every video gets its own shareable page with a transcript, and a copy-paste embed for your course platform, blog, or sales page. No Vimeo/Wistia needed.

highlights.label: Direct publish to YouTube
highlights.tip: Send the finished video straight to your channel — title, description and chapters filled in for you.

highlights.label: 1 viral Short generated per video
highlights.tip: Auto-clipped highlight from your video that you can post to your feeds to drive new students in.

highlights.label: Watermark-free Full HD exports
highlights.tip: Crisp 1080p downloads you can use anywhere — no OneTake logo, no sneaky branding on your work.

highlights.label: “The Real Time” live demos with the founder
highlights.tip: Weekly group session with our team — bring questions, watch real workflows, learn the tricks before you need them.

plans.name: Grow
plans.description: Your end-to-end content engine — from raw recording to every platform, automatically.

highlights.label: 240 editing minutes / month
highlights.tip: Enough for a weekly podcast plus a midweek short-form pillar — or a heavier course-launch cadence.

highlights.label: Videos up to 2 hours each
highlights.tip: Full webinars, fireside chats and recorded interviews go in whole — we handle the long-form heavy lifting.

highlights.label: Unlimited Shorts generation & downloads
highlights.tip: Regenerate Shorts as many times as you like and pick the one that hits — no per-video cap on attempts or downloads.

highlights.label: Publish + schedule to YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, LinkedIn
highlights.tip: Send each finished video to every channel — and queue it for the best posting time without leaving OneTake.

highlights.label: AI thumbnails optimised for engagement
highlights.tip: Pick from three click-tested thumbnail concepts per video — designed to make people stop scrolling.

highlights.label: Whitelabel hosting on your own domain
highlights.tip: Course videos live at videos.yourbrand.com — students never see OneTake. Builds trust and looks polished.

highlights.label: Clean podcast audio exports
highlights.tip: One click to a podcast-ready audio file with the same edits as your video — turn every recording into a Spotify episode.

highlights.label: Auto-import from your YouTube channel
highlights.tip: Connect your channel once and we’ll auto-edit every new upload in the background. Set-and-forget content pipeline.

highlights.label: Priority support + 1-on-1 Zoom with the team
highlights.tip: Jump the queue, and book real face-time when something is on fire — not chatbot purgatory.

plans.name: Scale
plans.description: OneTake runs in the background — your team uploads, automations handle the rest.

highlights.label: 600 editing minutes / month
highlights.tip: Team-scale capacity — enough for daily content output across multiple shows or brands.

highlights.label: Unlimited video length per upload
highlights.tip: Drop in a full-day workshop or a 4-hour summit recording — no length cap, no splitting up the file.

highlights.label: Up to 3 seats (more as add-on)
highlights.tip: Bring your VA, content manager and editor into one workspace — everyone sees the same library.

highlights.label: Multi-user + sub-accounts
highlights.tip: Give clients or team members their own login that uploads straight into your account — perfect for agencies and group coaching programs.

highlights.label: API access for batch processing
highlights.tip: Connect OneTake to your CRM, LMS or Zapier flows — drop a file in a folder, get a finished video back, automatically.

highlights.label: Everything in Grow, fully unlocked
highlights.tip: All the editing, publishing, hosting and content tools from Grow — nothing is held back.

highlights.label: Priority support + 1-on-1 Zoom with the team
highlights.tip: Same direct line as Grow — book time with the team whenever you need to unblock production.

rows.label: Instant AI editing
rows.tip: Removes background noise, awkward silences and verbal stumbles, adds captions, drops in B-roll, picks a music track, and applies a video style — automatically, in one pass.

rows.label: Agentic editing + content generation
rows.tip: Chat with OneTake to refine the edit, and generate scripts, summaries, quizzes, lesson outlines and social captions from your recording.

rows.label: Editing minutes per month
rows.tip: Total minutes of source video you can process each month. Resets monthly.

rows.label: Max video length per upload
rows.tip: How long a single recording can be. Longer = full webinars, summits and workshops go through in one piece.

rows.label: Teleprompter
rows.tip: Record directly in OneTake with your script scrolling on-screen — look natural while staying on-message.

rows.label: Virtual cameraman
rows.tip: Automatically keeps you centred and framed as you move — like having a camera operator on every shoot.

rows.label: Custom logo + colour palette
rows.tip: Your brand colours and logo applied to every video — no designer involved.

rows.label: Premium + social-native video styles
rows.tip: Modern, influencer-style layouts and motion designed for short-form feeds — the kind of look that makes people stop scrolling.

rows.label: Full HD (1080p), watermark-free
rows.tip: Crisp 1080p downloads, ready for any platform — and no OneTake logo on your work.

rows.label: Podcast audio export (clean, audio-only)
rows.tip: Same cuts and clean-up as the video, but as a podcast-ready audio file you can drop into Spotify or Apple Podcasts.

rows.label: Shorts generation per video
rows.tip: Auto-clipped highlight reels from your video — perfect for Reels, TikTok and YouTube Shorts to drive new students.

rows.label: Shorts downloads per video
rows.tip: How many of those Shorts you can actually save off as files to post anywhere.

rows.label: AI thumbnails optimised for engagement
rows.tip: Three click-tested concepts per video — designed to win the scroll, no designer needed.

rows.label: Custom-prompt thumbnails
rows.tip: Describe the thumbnail you want and we generate it — your style, your hook.

rows.label: Whitelabel custom domain hosting
rows.tip: Course videos live on videos.yourbrand.com — students never see OneTake. Builds trust and looks polished.

rows.label: Shareable hosted video pages
rows.tip: Every video gets its own page with title, transcript and highlights — share a link, no upload needed elsewhere.

rows.label: Embeddable player
rows.tip: Drop a copy-paste embed into your course platform, sales page or blog. Works in any LMS.

rows.label: Auto language detection on player
rows.tip: If a viewer arrives speaking Spanish and you have a Spanish translation, they get it automatically.

rows.label: Direct social publishing
rows.tip: Send your finished video straight to the platform with title, description and hashtags filled in.

rows.label: Scheduled posts per month
rows.tip: Queue up content to post at peak times automatically — set it on Sunday, ship all week.

rows.label: Seats / users
rows.tip: How many people share the workspace. Bring your VA, content manager or editor into one library.

rows.label: Auto-import — YouTube channel
rows.tip: Connect your channel once; we monitor it and auto-edit every new upload in the background.

rows.label: Multi-user + sub-accounts
rows.tip: Give clients or team members their own login that uploads straight into your account — ideal for group coaching and agencies.

rows.label: API access
rows.tip: Hook OneTake into your CRM, LMS or Zapier flows — drop a file in a folder, get a finished video back, no clicks.

rows.label: Subtitles-only translation
rows.tip: Translate the captions on your video into another language — great for reaching students who don’t speak your native language but understand by reading.

values.trial: Try once on a video, 1 target language
Try once on a video, up to 3 languages
Try once on a video, up to 5 languages

rows.label: Audio dubbing with translation
rows.tip: Your voice translated and spoken in another language — same energy, new market. Choose single-speaker or multi-speaker voice cloning.

values.trial: Try once on a ≤30 min video
Try once on a ≤45 min video
Try once on a ≤60 min video

rows.label: Lip sync + dubbing
rows.tip: Translated audio AND your lips re-synced to the new language — feels like you recorded it natively. Premium experience for premium offers.

values.trial: Try once on a ≤10 min video
Try once on a ≤15 min video
Try once on a ≤30 min video

rows.label: Gaze correction
rows.tip: Makes it look like you’re looking right into the camera — even when you were reading notes off-screen. Saves the take, every time.

values.trial: Try once on a ≤30 min video
Try once on a ≤45 min video
Try once on a ≤60 min video

rows.label: Background removal
rows.tip: Cleanly removes your room and replaces it with a backdrop — turn a messy desk shot into a polished, branded scene.

values.trial: Try once on a ≤30 min video
Try once on a ≤45 min video
Try once on a ≤60 min video

rows.label: Knowledge base + email + in-app chat
rows.tip: Self-serve help for the everyday stuff — answers in minutes, not days.

rows.label: “The Real Time” live demos with the founder
rows.tip: Recurring live session with our team — bring real questions and watch real workflows.

rows.label: Priority support + 1-on-1 Zoom with the team
rows.tip: Skip the queue and book real face-time when something is on fire.
